display.purpose: Window titles, primary headings in System 7 theme.

body.purpose: Default body text in System 7 theme. 12px bitmap font.

mono.purpose: Code, terminal, file paths across all themes.

aqua-ui.purpose: Primary UI font in macOS Aqua theme. 13px with antialiasing.

win98-ui.purpose: Primary UI font in Windows 98 theme. 11px pixel font.

xp-ui.purpose: Primary UI font in Windows XP theme. 11px.

shadows.name: aqua-window
shadows.purpose: macOS Aqua window drop shadow. Soft, diffuse.

shadows.name: system7-window
shadows.purpose: System 7 window drop shadow. Hard offset, zero blur.

shadows.name: xp-window
shadows.purpose: Windows XP window drop shadow. Moderate blur and offset.

shadows.name: aqua-button-inner-glow
shadows.purpose: Aqua primary button inner highlight for glass effect.

motion.name: aqua-pulse
motion.purpose: Aqua primary button default-state attention pulse.

components.name: System 7 Button
components.description: Classic Mac System 7 3D beveled button with 9-slice border-image.
components.css: .ds-btn-retro { background: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-family: 'ChicagoKare', 'ArkPixel', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; -webkit-font-smoothing: none; font-smooth: never; padding: 4px 12px; border: 2px solid #000000; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-retro:hover { filter: brightness(0.95); } .ds-btn-retro:active { background: #cccccc; } .ds-btn-retro:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Aqua Primary Button
components.description: macOS Aqua glass capsule button with subtle pulse animation.
components.css: .ds-btn-aqua-primary { position: relative; height: 28px; padding: 0 16px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #4a90d9, #2565b8); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'LucidaGrande', 'Lucida Grande', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; border: none; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3) inset, 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); animation: ds-aqua-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-btn-aqua-primary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 1px; left: 4px; right: 4px; height: 40%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0.35), transparent); border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-aqua-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #5a9de6, #3070c4); } .ds-btn-aqua-primary:active { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #2565b8, #1a4d91); box-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) inset, 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-btn-aqua-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(52, 106, 227, 0.25), 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3) inset; } @keyframes ds-aqua-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.92; } }

components.name: Aqua Secondary Button
components.description: macOS Aqua subtle gray secondary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-aqua-secondary { position: relative; height: 28px; padding: 0 16px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ffffff, #e8e8e8); color: #000000; font-family: 'LucidaGrande', 'Lucida Grande', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; } .ds-btn-aqua-secondary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 1px; left: 3px; right: 3px; height: 40%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), transparent); border-radius: 11px 11px 0 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-aqua-secondary:hover { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #f8f8f8, #dddddd); } .ds-btn-aqua-secondary:active { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #dddddd, #cccccc); } .ds-btn-aqua-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(52, 106, 227, 0.25); }

components.name: Win98 Button
components.description: Windows 98 3D beveled button with raised/sunken states.
components.css: .ds-btn-win98 { background: #c0c0c0; color: #000000; font-family: 'Pixelated MS Sans Serif', 'MS Sans Serif', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; -webkit-font-smoothing: none; font-smooth: never; padding: 4px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 #ffffff, inset -1px -1px 0 #808080, 1px 1px 0 #0a0a0a; outline: 1px solid #0a0a0a; } .ds-btn-win98:hover { filter: brightness(1.02); } .ds-btn-win98:active { box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #ffffff, inset 1px 1px 0 #808080; padding: 5px 11px 3px 13px; } .ds-btn-win98:focus-visible { outline: 1px dotted #000000; outline-offset: -4px; }

components.name: Aqua Input
components.description: macOS Aqua text input with inset shadow and blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-aqua { width: 100%; height: 28px; padding: 4px 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-family: 'LucidaGrande', 'Lucida Grande', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input-aqua:focus { outline: none; border-color: #346ae3; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 0 0 3px rgba(52, 106, 227, 0.25); } .ds-input-aqua::placeholder { color: #999999; }

components.name: System 7 Input
components.description: System 7 square text input with hard black border.
components.css: .ds-input-retro { width: 100%; height: 24px; padding: 2px 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-family: 'Geneva-12', 'ArkPixel', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; -webkit-font-smoothing: none; font-smooth: never; border: 2px solid #000000; border-radius: 0; } .ds-input-retro:focus { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-input-retro::placeholder { color: #999999; }

components.name: Aqua Dialog
components.description: macOS Aqua dialog window with pinstripe background and traffic light controls.
components.html:
Dialog Title
Content goes here
components.css: .ds-dialog-aqua { background: #ececec; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border-radius: 0.45rem; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); overflow: hidden; } .ds-dialog-aqua-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 8px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #e8e8e8, #d0d0d0); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); position: relative; } .ds-traffic-light { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-traffic-light.close { background: #ff6057; } .ds-traffic-light.minimize { background: #ffbd2e; } .ds-traffic-light.maximize { background: #27c93f; } .ds-dialog-aqua-title { flex: 1; text-align: center; font-family: 'LucidaGrande', 'Lucida Grande', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #000000; text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-dialog-aqua-body { padding: 20px; font-family: 'LucidaGrande', 'Lucida Grande', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #000000; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

narrative.overview:
ryOS is a browser-based desktop operating system that spans four eras of personal computing: System 7, macOS X Aqua, Windows 98, and Windows XP. Each theme is a self-contained visual language — the design system does not unify them, it faithfully reproduces them. The coherence across themes is in behavior and spatial organization, not in look. Every pixel, bevel, gradient, and bitmap font is chosen because the source OS chose it first. Polish means getting the details right, not making them consistent.

The system is playful, crafted, and nostalgic. It treats UI chrome as material: buttons depress, titlebars shade, surfaces cast shadows or don't — depending on which computer you sat down at. This is a workbench, not a museum. Every component is interactive and functional.
keyCharacteristics: Four period-accurate visual languages, no forced cross-theme unification
Materially honest components: buttons feel like real objects
Bitmap pixel fonts with no antialiasing in retro themes; smooth anti-aliased text in Aqua
Monochrome body with OS-specific chromatic accents
Accessibility: WCAG AA target, reduced-motion support, keyboard navigation

rules.name: The No Global Color Rule
rules.body: Never apply one theme's color to another. Aqua selection blue must not appear in System 7 chrome. Each theme is self-contained.

rules.name: The Respect the Bitmap Grid Rule
rules.body: Retro theme fonts (ChicagoKare, Pixelated MS Sans Serif) must render at their native pixel sizes. Never scale them by non-integer factors. Never apply letter-spacing, transform, or subpixel positioning.

rules.name: The Source OS First Rule
rules.body: When choosing how a component conveys depth, look up what the source OS did. If System 7 had no shadows, the System 7 theme must not have them.

dos: Do use --os-color-* and --os-font-ui tokens. Never hardcode a color or font that should be theme-aware.
Do design macOS Aqua first, then validate across System 7, XP, and Win98.
Do respect bitmap font pixel grids with -webkit-font-smoothing: none and font-smooth: never.
Do use the shared z-index scale for layering across themes.
Do make components materially honest. If a button depresses in the source OS, it should depress here too.
Do target WCAG AA contrast ratios and support reduced motion.
donts: Don't mix theme colors across OS boundaries.
Don't apply antialiasing to retro theme fonts.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds.
Don't use glassmorphism, blur effects, or decorative transparency beyond source OS fidelity.
Don't default to modals. Use inline editing and progressive disclosure first.
Don't add shadows to System 7 or Win98 chrome.
Don't invent new visual conventions. Every decision should trace back to a source OS behavior.
